about.bio: I am Samir Hashimov, a Front-End developer and UI designer based in Baku, Azerbaijan. I create modern web applications with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and React. Additionally, I create and publish my own products. My link management platform, called Blink, is available on the web, on Google Play, and as a Firefox extension. Currently, I am deepening my knowledge of the React ecosystem, exploring TypeScript, and switching to using Tailwind for efficiency.

contact.text: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you.
